target.title: Release idle WebViews on memory pressure
target.body:
## Summary

- Add a macOS memory-pressure monitor for warning and critical pressure events.
- Evict only idle cached OpenAI dashboard WebViews when pressure arrives, preserving active dashboard refreshes.
- Run malloc pressure relief alongside the WebView cache cleanup.

## Proof

- Real local before profile, installed CodexBar 0.36.1 with trace logging: main app idle averaged 0.152% CPU and 30.6 MB RSS, while the associated WebKit WebContent process held a 306.1 MB physical footprint with a 541.7 MB peak after dashboard work. Samples were idle/mach_msg dominated, pointing to retained WebKit memory rather than a Swift CPU loop.
- After-fix runtime proof added in `b2854cbb`: the DEBUG-only distributed notification hook seeds the shared OpenAI dashboard WebView cache with one idle entry and one busy entry, then drives the same `MemoryPressureMonitor` path used by warning/critical pressure handling.
- Built debug executable launched from `/Users/alec/Dev/CodexBar/.build/debug/CodexBar`, then triggered with:

```sh
/usr/bin/swift -e 'import Foundation; DistributedNotificationCenter.default().postNotificationName(Notification.Name("com.steipete.codexbar.debug.simulateMemoryPressure"), object: nil, userInfo: ["level": "warning", "seedCaches": "1"], deliverImmediately: true)'
```

- Unified log proof from the running built process:

```text
2026-06-16 11:27:00.722 I  CodexBar[99733:14b9f98] [com.steipete.codexbar:memory-pressure] Debug memory pressure notification received (level=warning seedCaches=1)
2026-06-16 11:27:00.723 E  CodexBar[99733:14b9f98] [com.steipete.codexbar:memory-pressure] System memory pressure (level=warning)
2026-06-16 11:27:00.723 I  CodexBar[99733:14b9f98] [com.steipete.codexbar:memory-pressure] Memory pressure OpenAI webview cache (after=1 before=2 evicted=1)
```

- `swift test --filter OpenAIDashboardWebViewCacheTests`: 19 tests passed after 1.949 seconds; the focused run also logged `before=2 after=1 evicted=1` while preserving the busy cached WebView.
- `swift build --build-tests`: passed.
- `swiftformat Sources/CodexBar/Notifications+CodexBar.swift Sources/CodexBar/CodexbarApp.swift Sources/CodexBar/MemoryPressureMonitor.swift Sources/CodexBarCore/OpenAIWeb/OpenAIDashboardFetcher.swift`: passed.
- `swiftlint --strict`: 0 violations, 0 serious in 1139 files.
- `git diff --check`: passed.
- Previous `make check` note: locally blocked before Swift lint by the existing `node --check docs/site.js` ESM mismatch under Node v25.9.0; the checked `upstream/main:docs/site.js` starts with an ESM import as well, so this is not introduced by this patch.
target.author: prospectore
